creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to sergey.v.brunov from comment #4)

> Yes, I would like to pick it up! How can I do this?

Just volunteering is enough. Now please take care of this port :)

You may want to look through https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/makefile-maintainer.html for more info on maintainership.
